message:
fix(test): correct weak Plausible CSP assertion in security tests

- Remove unused `page` parameter from test function
- Fix weak assertion that always passed: `csp.includes("script-src")`
  was always true since every CSP has script-src directive
- Now correctly asserts that "plausible.io" is present in CSP

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -300,7 +300,7 @@ {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-rqbs","title":"Unit Tests: CLI Config & Offline Cache","description":"## Task Create unit tests for CLI configuration parsing and offline cache behavior. ## Why This Matters - CLI settings must persist across runs - Offline mode should be predictable and safe ## Test Scenarios 1. Config file read/write roundtrip 2. Invalid config falls back to defaults 3. Project config overrides user config 4. Env var overrides apply correctly 5. Offline cache stores and retrieves prompts 6. Cache eviction respects size limits 7. Cache schema migration retains data ## Logging Requirements - Log config paths and fallback reasons per test case - Record cache hit/miss/eviction stats - Emit structured test logs for failures with full context ## Files to Create - tests/unit/cli/config.test.ts - tests/unit/cli/offline-cache.test.ts ## Success Criteria - Config handling stable - Offline cache deterministic - Failures provide actionable logs ## Origin Moved from `jeffreysprompts_premium-9gvm`. ","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-11T02:24:25.443212341-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T02:24:25.443212341-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-rqbs","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-ctt5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T02:24:25.449063799-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-rqbs","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-xzgq","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T02:24:25.452349312-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-rt6z","title":"Task: Export command tests with real temp file output","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T17:45:02.879245521-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T19:06:51.840994251-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T19:06:51.840994251-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented real temp directory tests in skills.test.ts, registry.test.ts, export.test.ts. Removed all mock.module() usage.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-rt6z","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-5mm","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T17:55:27.331919665-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-rwq0","title":"Task: E2E test - Touch gestures and bottom sheets","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T17:48:22.77212535-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T21:02:32.660657608-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T21:02:32.660657608-05:00","close_reason":"Added mobile bottom sheet drag-to-dismiss E2E test","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-rwq0","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-945","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T17:58:16.487995466-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} -{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-s5as","title":"Implement mobile-first responsive design","description":"## Origin Mirror from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-shm. Keep both repos in sync. ## Task Implement mobile-first responsive design for all pages. ## Why This Matters From README: "We optimize for an elite UX across desktop and mobile." ## Responsive Breakpoints Using Tailwind's default breakpoints: - `sm`: 640px (large phones) - `md`: 768px (tablets) - `lg`: 1024px (laptops) - `xl`: 1280px (desktops) - `2xl`: 1536px (large desktops) ## Mobile-First Patterns ### 1. Navigation - Hamburger menu on mobile - Slide-out drawer for navigation - Bottom tab bar for primary actions - Collapsible header on scroll ### 2. Content Layout - Single column on mobile - Multi-column grid on desktop - Cards stack vertically on mobile - Touch-friendly spacing (min 44px targets) ### 3. Forms - Full-width inputs on mobile - Stack labels above inputs - Large touch targets for buttons - Keyboard-optimized input types ### 4. Tables - Horizontal scroll with sticky column - Or convert to card layout on mobile - Collapsible rows for detail ### 5. Modals - Full-screen on mobile - Slide-up sheet pattern - Easy dismiss with swipe - Fixed footer for actions ## Component Updates ### Mobile Header ```typescript // src/components/layout/mobile-header.tsx export function MobileHeader() { return (
); } ``` ### Mobile Navigation ```typescript // src/components/layout/mobile-nav.tsx export function MobileNav({ isOpen, onClose }: Props) { return (
{/* Navigation items */}
); } ``` ### Responsive Grid ```typescript
{items.map(item => )}
``` ## Touch Interactions - Swipe gestures for navigation - Pull-to-refresh where appropriate - Long-press for context menus - Haptic feedback (where supported) ## Performance on Mobile - Lazy load images below fold - Reduce initial bundle for mobile - Optimize for slower connections - Respect data saver mode ## Testing Requirements - Test on actual devices (iOS Safari, Android Chrome) - Test in Playwright mobile viewport - Test touch interactions - Test with slow network throttling ## Files to Create - `src/components/layout/mobile-header.tsx` - `src/components/layout/mobile-nav.tsx` - `src/components/layout/mobile-tab-bar.tsx` - `src/components/ui/swipe-sheet.tsx` - `src/hooks/use-mobile.ts` ## Success Criteria - All pages usable on mobile - Touch targets are adequate size - Navigation is intuitive - Performance is acceptable on 3G - No horizontal overflow ","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:23:35.477171694-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T01:23:35.477171694-05:00"} +{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-s5as","title":"Implement mobile-first responsive design","description":"## Origin Mirror from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-shm. Spotlight search and selection","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T17:47:54.371332031-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T19:16:31.848158861-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T19:16:31.848158861-05:00","close_reason":"Already comprehensively implemented in e2e/web/spotlight.spec.ts - tests cover Cmd+K/Ctrl+K opening, Escape closing, typing to search, arrow key navigation, Enter to copy, 'No results' state, clicking results, and ARIA accessibility","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-shi3","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-945","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T17:57:55.900113276-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-skwl","title":"Public site: add Pro CTA + Login in Nav","description":"## Goal Add a clear, tasteful path to Pro from the public site without undermining the free-first UX. Users should easily find: - **Go Pro** (primary CTA) - **Login** (secondary link for existing Pro users) ## Primary Placement - **Component:** `apps/web/src/components/Nav.tsx` - **Entry point:** `apps/web/src/app/layout.tsx` renders `
` ## UX & Visual Requirements - **Free-first:** CTA should be visible but not dominant. - **Desktop:** - Secondary text link: **Login** - Primary button-like link: **Go Pro** (or **Upgrade** if copy fits better) - **Mobile:** - Add both links to the mobile sheet/menu. - **Go Pro** must be visually stronger than **Login**. - **Don’t break layout:** no wrapping or overflow at common widths. ## URL & Routing - Base URL: `https://pro.jeffreysprompts.com` - CTA: `${PRO_URL}/` (Go Pro) - Login: `${PRO_URL}/login` ## Implementation Details 1) **Add a public env var** - `NEXT_PUBLIC_PRO_URL` with default fallback to `https://pro.jeffreysprompts.com`. - Update `apps/web/src/lib/env.ts` (or relevant env schema) to include it. 2) **Centralize URL usage** - In `Nav.tsx`, define: ```ts const PRO_URL = env.NEXT_PUBLIC_PRO_URL ?? "https://pro.jeffreysprompts.com"; const proHref = `${PRO_URL}/`; const loginHref = `${PRO_URL}/login`; ``` 3) **Styling** - Use existing button/link styles in the nav to match the design system. - Prefer shadcn `Button` or existing Tailwind utility classes used in `Nav.tsx`. ## Analytics (Optional but Preferred) If analytics helper exists (e.g., `apps/web/src/lib/analytics.ts`), add events: - `pro_cta_clicked` (button) - `pro_login_clicked` (link) Attach context: `{ placement: "nav", device: "desktop|mobile" }` if available. ## Edge Cases - If `NEXT_PUBLIC_PRO_URL` is missing, default to hardcoded `https://pro.jeffreysprompts.com`. - Ensure external link safety if using `target="_blank"`: include `rel="noopener noreferrer"`. ## Acceptance Criteria - Desktop and mobile nav both show **Go Pro** and **Login**. - Both links route to Pro site endpoints above. - Styles match the current nav and preserve free-first tone. - No layout regression on small screens. - (Optional) Analytics events fire on click. ","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T20:12:19.562656095-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T20:20:02.180861176-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T20:15:57.113388858-05:00","close_reason":"Added Pro CTA and Login links to Nav: desktop shows Login (secondary) and Go Pro button (primary with Crown icon) before basket; mobile menu shows same links in a separated section. Uses NEXT_PUBLIC_PRO_URL env var with fallback to pro.jeffreysprompts.com. All tests pass (488)."} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-sqe","title":"Implement transcript processor (lib/transcript/processor.ts)","description":"Part 10.4 of PLAN. processTranscript(rawJsonl) parses JSONL, extracts messages/toolCalls/thinking, auto-detects sections via heuristics (ultrathink = deep thinking, clusters of Edit = implementation, etc), calculates stats (userMessages, assistantMessages, toolCalls, filesEdited, linesWritten, tokensUsed). Returns ProcessedTranscript for display.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:44:50.293889927-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T01:37:50.793281326-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T01:37:50.793281326-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented transcript processor in apps/web/src/lib/transcript/processor.ts","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-sqe","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-cke","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:48:33.823124595-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
